name: Dario Amodei
bio: Italian-American AI researcher, formerly VP of Research at OpenAI. Co-founded Anthropic with his sister Daniela in 2021, focused on AI safety research. The architect behind the Claude model series.

quotes.text: We're seeing capabilities emerge that we didn't deliberately train for. This isn't a bug — it's a signal on the path to AGI.
Safety is not the opposite of speed. We've proven you can be the safest and the most powerful at the same time.
The reliability problem in agents is fundamentally a reasoning problem. When the model is smart enough, it naturally knows when to stop and ask a human.

I expect that within 18 months, AI systems will be able to independently complete most software engineering tasks. This isn't a prediction — it's an extrapolation of trends we're already observing internally.
